title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Oil India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Oil India
jsonLd.description:
Oil India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Oil India:
Oil India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
